title: Magic Gems I
body:
GEMS - A Mystical Power Awakened

Unleash the arcane power of legendary Gems! The GEMS mod adds a collection of powerful, one-of-a-kind magical artifacts to your Minecraft world. Each Gem holds unique abilities—from summoning black holes to teleporting through dimensions and unleashing devastating attacks.

Use them wisely... or risk triggering combat mode, bans, or worse. With built-in combat tagging and server-safe mechanics, GEMS is perfect for survival multiplayer and competitive PvP.

✨ 10+ custom Gems
⚔️ Built-in combat logging system
🛡️ Powerful effects and visual magic
🧙‍♂️ Custom textures and sounds
🔒 Fully server-compatible

Forge your legend. Claim your Gem. Shape your destiny.
